channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped opposite 55 Wrottesley Road, 19th April
item.description:
Photos taken Sunday 19th April 2026. Someone on this road keeps doing this every week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green chain link from Winns Common to Wickham Lane is covered in litter and flytipping, 19th April
item.description:
The Green Chain link path from Winns common to Wickham lane is absolutely covered in litter and flytipped material. It’s the worst I’ve ever seen it. Could it please be sorted out.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Microwave and ironing board dumped on Genesta Road/Mayplace Lane corner, 19th April
item.description:
Photos taken Sunday 19th April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Genesta Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in middle of road, 19th April
item.description:
Thus pothole has been here for a couple of months and is getting worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
Obstructing access to bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fremont Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on Herbert Terrace outside All Saints Church, 19th April
item.description:
Photos taken 19th April 2026. Fridge is dumped on the pavement of Herbert Terrace near the church.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit Holder Time plate painted, 19th April
item.description:
Permit Holder Time plate painted on Brandon Street Lamp Post 07
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Brandon Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement outside 153 Herbert Road, 19th April
item.description:
Bags of rubbish just dumped on pavement. Photos taken Sunday 19th April 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuing fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
There are rubbish bags at the junction if Riverdale Road and Saunders Road. This was cleared a few days ago and now there is more rubbish. This is becoming a regular fly tipping spot
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reopen 9204225, 19th April
item.description:
I do not believe anyone has visited this pothole which does fit the criteria set for repair. It was closed within a day of reporting over the weekend. Send someone to repair please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Berens Court, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped single mattress, 19th April
item.description:
Blocking path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Tovil Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
This was dumbed here. In a different note: a trash bin on shepherdess walk would great alleviate the cleanliness on our blocks. There are none between peckington estate and a few blocks down. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zip Wire Fixed but not Greased, 19th April
item.description:
The zip wire has been fixed, thank you, but it hasn’t been greased so it doesn’t work properly. Only half a job done unfortunately.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit Holders Bay Painted on Mina Road, 19th April
item.description:
2 Permit Holder Bays Painted on Mina Road LP 08 & 09
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mina Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish from bin and co op rubbish items left on public pathway along parade of shops. Looks horrible and needs cleaning. Rubbish and food will attract vermin. Parsonage manorway outside parade of shops

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Manorway, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over 50 inch tag on side of my house, public space facing, 19th April
item.description:
Newly appeared graffiti tag on the side of my house in a public facing space. Same graffiti tag has appeared on the side of the house diagonally opposite.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwallis Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foul smell from Mutton Brook, 19th April
item.description:
There is a foul smell from MuttonnBrook.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norrice Lea, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping mess and Lime bikes, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish spread around from fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes on main A406/A41, 19th April
item.description:
There is a potholes on main A406/A41. It is a very busy road so you can’t slow down to try and avoid it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Circular Road, Temple Fortune, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 19th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish from bin and Co op rubbish. Looks horrible and needs cleaning. This rubbish and food will attract vermin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellring Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
